rows.label: qev040902_MSG0001
rows.name:
Nii-chan dashingly returning home
with the shining legendary sword![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0002
rows.name:
Moimoi can already see
that heroic figure-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Huh? But heroic figure... what
is a heroic figure again-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0004
rows.name: It's delicious-mo~! I'm so happy-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0005
rows.name:
Wh... what is the meaning of
this-mo...? Why have you
already started the party-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0006
rows.name: Ah! Nii-chan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0007
rows.name:
Moimoi was just way too hungry...
so I ate the food first-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0008
rows.name:
But you received a whole lot of
money, right-mo? Let's just keep
ordering more and more-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_JNK0010
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev040902_SEL0011
rows.name:
Scold Moimoi for starting
the party without you.

rows.label: qev040902_JNK0020
rows.name: Admonish

rows.label: qev040902_SEL0021
rows.name:
Calm Muimui down by saying it's a
way to repay his younger brother.

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0009
rows.name:
I-I'm sorry-mo... But Moimoi hasn't
eaten anything at all recently,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0010
rows.name:
and when a feast was lined up right
in front of my eyes, I just couldn't
hold back anymore-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Muimui has also been starving
this whole time, so I understand
that feeling painfully well-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0012
rows.name:
It's true... the reason I could make it
this far was because Moimoi was here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0013
rows.name:
I've put him through quite
a lot of hardship-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0014
rows.name:
Understood-mo! You don't
need to worry about it-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0015
rows.name:
Besides... the current Muimui is
a rich man. I shouldn't be shaken
by something like this-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0016
rows.name:
...Heheh. I'm going to order more and
more food, so wait right there-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0017
rows.name:
[ST:playername ]! It's Muimui's treat-mo! You should
eat until your stomach is full too-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0018
rows.name: Whew~! Nii-chan is so cool-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0019
rows.name: Gih! GYAAAAAAH!!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0020
rows.name: Moimoi! Just how much did you eat-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0021
rows.name: I-I paid the bill and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0022
rows.name:
The reward we received...
It's completely gone-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0023
rows.name:
Umm... I was so happy that I
don't really have much memory
from the halfway point-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0024
rows.name:
A-at this rate, it's right back to
the life of poverty-mo! And what's
more, Muimui is still starving...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_JNK0030
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev040902_SEL0031
rows.name: Scold Moimoi for overeating.

rows.label: qev040902_JNK0040
rows.name: Admonish

rows.label: qev040902_SEL0041
rows.name:
Admonish Muimui that he can
just start over from scratch.

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0025
rows.name:
B-but... Moimoi was hungry
for so, so long...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0026
rows.name:
...Uugh, that's because Nii-chan
doesn't do any work at all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0027
rows.name:
Mumo! That's what you call snapping
back-mo! Moimoi! Give it back-mo!
Hurry up and give the food back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0028
rows.name:
No way-mo! Experiencing such scary
things in BLADE... I don't want
to do that for a while-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Moimoi! Give it back-mo! Hurry
up and give the food back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0030
rows.name:
No matter how much of a genius
inventor Moimoi is, I can't make
something that amazing-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0031
rows.name:
Rather than demanding something like
that, it's more realistic for Nii-chan
to go out and do more work-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040902_MSG0032
rows.name:
Mumoooooo! You're getting cheeky-mo! You
little... I'll teach you the terror of your
Nii-chan for the first time in a while-mo![ST:wait ]
